decisions.question: Is 'CHAPTER ONE' (extraction block:6, emitted as section_heading) an expected element, waived page chrome, or part of the INTRODUCTION heading?
decisions.resolution: Add to the expected contract as its own row with type chapter_label. It is real, visible document structure; extracting it is correct extractor behavior.
decisions.decided_via: Claude Code session AskUserQuestion (GS001 human-decision boundary, PR grahama1970/pdf_oxide#1)
decisions.consequence: Expected contract grows from 9 to 11 rows (with gs001-decision-002); the R8 'extras' count drops by one.

decisions.question: Is the subtitle 'THE NEED TO PROTECT INFORMATION, SYSTEMS, ORGANIZATIONS, AND INDIVIDUALS' (extraction block:8, emitted as paragraph_block) an expected element, part of the title, or a waived extra?
decisions.resolution: Add to the expected contract as its own row with type section_subtitle. The R11 ledger entry nist-subtitle-001 already promotes this block to section_subtitle; the contract now demands that typing.
decisions.decided_via: Claude Code session AskUserQuestion (GS001 human-decision boundary, PR grahama1970/pdf_oxide#1)
decisions.consequence: Expected contract grows from 9 to 11 rows; extractor must emit type section_subtitle for this block (ledger nist-subtitle-001 provides the promotion rule).

non_claims: These decisions do not claim the remaining 9 rows of the v2 contract; those must be recovered from the original human-labeled bundle or relabeled.
